race.comment: Looks the perfect race for PRESTAR (2) who will find this a fair bit easier than a last start placing at Flemington in good 3yo company. The first-up run when just edged out by Blankfield also reads well and he rates highly back to this level. GOLDEN MAGNATE (7) hasn't been able to replicate a fast maiden win at Moe on debut in two runs since but they've been in solid company and he can improve again. KAGEMUSHA (3) has been sound in two runs back and sets up well from an inside gate. He stuck on well behind an in form horse here last time and should be at peak fitness. TALKIN' ITALIAN (5) worked home well fresh and should strip fitter, respecting.
